name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition or change

## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today, or what is awkward? Concrete example helps. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Optional: how would you solve it? Sketch of API or behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you ruled out, and why. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Component-side change (schema, dispatch, http, registry, audit)
- [ ] Client-side change (`McpGateway` API, `defineMcp*`)
- [ ] Documentation / examples
- [ ] Tests / tooling
